001 — About

The Oil Inu.
CTO Edition.

$OILINU is a community takeover (CTO) token on Solana, reclaimed and reignited by a passionate community determined to take things to the next level.

No dev. No rugs. Just the community, the meme, and the mission. $OILINU runs on pure momentum — fueled by holders who believe in the cause and the culture.

Born on pump.fun. Built by the people. Powered by oil and Inu energy. The community is the team — and the team never sleeps.

002 — How to Buy

Get $OILINU
in 4 steps.

01
Get a Solana Wallet
Download Phantom or Solflare wallet. Create a new wallet and secure your seed phrase.
02
Buy SOL
Purchase SOL from any major exchange (Coinbase, Binance, Kraken) and send it to your wallet.
03
Go to pump.fun
Visit pump.fun and paste the $OILINU contract address into the search bar.
04
Swap for $OILINU
Connect your wallet, enter the amount of SOL, and confirm the swap. Welcome to the community.
